$comment: Project-scope Claude Code settings for ai-sysdesign-knowledge. Permissions are scoped tightly to scripts/ and read-only ops. Hooks intentionally minimal — auto-lint on write is opt-in via /lint-bilingual or the PostToolUse hook below, which runs validate_refs.py --quick on saved case studies. Non-blocking — errors print but don't abort.

hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE '"file_path":\s*"[^"]*(case-studies|drafts)/[^"]*\.md"'; then FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c 'import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get("file_path",""))' 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && [ -f "$FILE" ]; then python scripts/validate_refs.py "$FILE" 2>&1 | grep -E '(FAIL|missing|invalid)' | head -5 || true; fi; fi

if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE '"file_path":\s*"[^"]*(case-studies/|drafts/|docs/planned\.yaml)'; then python scripts/build_index.py --check-duplicates 2>&1 | grep -E '(ERROR|^  S[0-9])' | head -20 || true; fi
